LIGHTWEIGHT & MANEUVERABLE: Weighing in at just 1.00 kgs (Net Weight), this attachment adds minimal weight to your grinder. Its lightweight design ensures that the assembled tool remains easy to handle and maneuver, reducing user fatigue during overhead or extended cutting work.
